Fix review-skia-update milestone detection (#3665)

Read the old and new Skia milestones from the companion SkiaSharp PR base/head cgmanifest snapshots instead of the current worktree state. This keeps the orchestrator comparing the real pre-bump and post-bump upstream branches even when the local checkout already contains the milestone bump.

commit.message:
Implement inline single-PR test workflow with approved-then-test pipeline

- Add TestWorkflow config (inline/separate-pr) to WorkspaceConfig
- TE watches for 'approved' PRs instead of merged PRs in inline mode
- TE checks out PR branch, verifies base build, generates tests, builds/tests
  with AI retry, commits and pushes to the original PR's branch
- Pre-push safety: verify PR still open, handle push rejection with pull+retry
- API-only fallback when workspace unavailable (batch commit via GitHub API)
- PE: approve but don't merge when inline mode active (AwaitingTests result)
- PE: new MergeTestedPRsAsync scans for approved+tests-added PRs and merges
- PE posts 'Waiting for Test Engineer' comment after code approval
- Extract AttemptMergeAsync shared merge logic in PullRequestWorkflow
- Add MergeApprovedTestedPRAsync for PE to merge tested PRs
- Add Labels.TestsAdded constant, MergeAttemptResult.AwaitingTests enum
- Fix Architect/PM callers for new optional bool parameter
- Label flow: in-progress → ready-for-review → approved → tests-added → MERGE

commit.message:
Fix critical protocol bugs from official LEGO docs

- ProgramFlowNotification: decode as action(u8), not timestamp(u32)
- TransferChunkRequest: add missing uint16 chunk_size field
- StartFileUploadRequest: use fixed 32-byte filename field
- SetHubNameRequest: use fixed 30-byte name field
- DeviceUuidResponse: decode as raw 16-byte UUID, format as UUID string
- CRC32: add spike3/crc.py with 4-byte alignment padding (per official spec)
- upload_program: ClearSlot first, use aligned CRC, use 'program.py' filename
- transport: serial reader loop now retries on PermissionError (up to 10x)
- enums: add MotorEndState, MotorDirection, HubFace from official docs
- Simulator responder updated to match new message formats

All 54 simulator tests pass.

  dispatch_and_freed_on_teardown: proves (a) a spawn-path actor carries
  a non-null arena, (b) activate_actor_wasm installs it as the current

completed content.

perf(maglev): switch deopt cooldown from exponential to linear backoff

Exponential backoff (2^count) was too aggressive: just 7 cold-IC deopts
during warmup produced a 128-invocation cooldown that exceeded Criterion's
entire measurement window, forcing the benchmark to run entirely in the
interpreter.

Linear backoff: wait 3*(count+1) invocations per deopt, capped at 50.
This ensures Maglev gets retried within the measurement window even after
repeated deopts, while still providing enough cooldown to avoid thrashing.

commit.message:
Add per-channel effect routing and channel selection UI

Master effects can now be routed to specific channels instead of
processing the full stereo mix. Channel-selected effects are applied
pre-mix via sub-mix buses (channel → subMix → effect → masterInput),
giving proper serial/inline processing.

New features:
- selectedChannels field on EffectConfig type
- Channel checkbox row on each master FX pedal (collapsible)
- ChannelRoutedEffectsManager handles sub-mix routing
- ToneEngine splits effects into channel-routed vs global during rebuild
- masterEffectsKey includes selectedChannels for rebuild triggers
- Send bus presets auto-route all channels at 50% send level

Architecture: channel-selected effects run BEFORE the mix point,
global master effects run AFTER (post-mix chain unchanged).
